_meta.source_proposal: ## PROPOSAL 057 · 2026-07-14T03:30:10Z · status: sim-ready (idea-engine control/outbox.md @ main 665dca9c458ba4e90f63c138b9c638189d403183, landed via idea-engine PR #391)
_meta.idea_doc: ideas/trading-strategy/paper-lane-beat-coin-2026-07-14.md @ idea-engine 665dca9 (blob pin 3d511a2269865e659bb3ff385f89c701f1f7b4d8 in the outbox idea: line)
_meta.hermetic: the runner reads ONLY this fixtures.json; zero repo/network reads at verdict time; every registered constant below copied verbatim from the PROPOSAL 057 block / idea doc
_meta.rational_encoding: all exact rationals are strings 'num/den' parsed to fractions.Fraction

protocol_quotes_at_d857e50.beat_rule: BEAT iff strategy cycle return > B&H cycle return, strictly.
protocol_quotes_at_d857e50.cycle_window: Strategy return over the cycle = flat (0%) outside the outcome window plus the trade P&L inside it; benchmark = $10,000 of AAPL bought at the cycle start, sold at this exit fill, same costs both sides.
protocol_quotes_at_d857e50.a6_less_favorable: the meaningful reading that is *less* favorable to the strategy: it charges every flat day (warm-up included) at full B&H opportunity cost
protocol_quotes_at_d857e50.a5_ties: MISS otherwise — including exact ties (§9, ambiguity A5)
protocol_quotes_at_d857e50.costs: DEFAULT_SLIPPAGE_BPS = 5.0, DEFAULT_COMMISSION_BPS = 1.0 (src/trading_lab/config.py:60-61) — 6 bps per side both strategies
protocol_quotes_at_d857e50.trade_rate: 17 trades in ~18 months on the holdout read … n will be single-digit for months. Verdicts are counted, not tested (§7, docs/paper-lane-protocol.md:217)

accounting.multiplicative: strategy cycle wealth factor = R_T * c^2; benchmark = R_F * R_T * c^2; BEAT iff strategy > benchmark strictly
accounting.fixed_notional_dollar: strategy $ = 10000*(R_T*(1-f) - (1+f)); benchmark $ = 10000*(R_F*R_T*(1-f) - (1+f)); f = 6/10000; the second-order asymmetry (sell cost on appreciated notional) computed exactly per lattice point, sign-flip count vs the multiplicative indicator reported

grading.test: one-sided Neyman-Pearson count test, non-randomized/conservative, size <= 1/20: smallest critical c with P(Bin(n, B_null) >= c) <= 1/20; power = P(Bin(n, B_alt) >= c)

arm_s.se_convention: SE = sqrt(B_exact*(1-B_exact)/N) with the EXACT Arm-A value (exact-variance convention, the V066/V067 precedent); for the power row SE = sqrt(power_exact*(1-power_exact)/N_seasons)
arm_s.gate: |EST - EXACT| <= 1/100 ABSOLUTE and |EST - EXACT| <= 4*SE, BOTH halves, on every decision-world B cell AND the power row

controls.F1: pmfs sum to 1 (F and T); E[X] - 1 = s*(2*p_up - 1) exact per drift world; mean cycle = 45/2; implied windows/18mo = 378/(45/2) in [15, 19]
controls.F2: no-tie theorem: 101^k * 99^(F-k) != 100^F for every F in support and 0 <= k <= F (101 prime, 101 does not divide 100^F) — asserted symbolically AND checked exhaustively over the support; k*(F) = F/2 exactly at every even F in support
controls.F4: monotonicity: B(NULL, drift) non-increasing across ZERO -> COMMITTED -> DOUBLE; B(delta, drift) increasing in delta over {-1/25, 0, 1/25, 2/25} at every drift; power non-decreasing in n over {8, 16, 34} and in delta over {0, 1/25, 2/25}
controls.F5: hand fixture F = 2 world: k*(2) = 1 and P(BEAT) = 1 - p^2 by hand, matched exactly per drift world
controls.sentinels: draw-count sentinels: per cycle exactly 1 F-draw + F coin-draws + 1 T-draw + T coin-draws; totals asserted against a counting-RNG wrapper per leg
controls.twin_evaluators: two independently written BEAT decision evaluators — E1: threshold k <= k*(F) with k*(F) precomputed by integer scan; E2: full protocol arithmetic wealth-factor comparison in exact Fractions (both accountings) — must agree at every lattice point and every MC cycle

decision_rule.REJECT: (a) identity gate BEAT <=> R_F < 1 with ZERO exceptions over the full enumerated lattice (every F in support x every k in 0..F) under the multiplicative accounting AND (b) B(NULL, COMMITTED) >= 13/25 AND (c) exact NP power at n = 8, size <= 1/20, NULL vs SKILL at COMMITTED drift < 1/2 AND (d) Arm S confirms within the agreement gate on every decision cell
decision_rule.INVALID: controls misbehaving — report, no ruling: any F1-F5 failure, draw-count sentinel failure, twin-evaluator disagreement, any agreement breach (headline decision cells, power row, or the stability leg failing to reproduce the ruling)
decision_rule.APPROVE: power >= 4/5 at n = 8 AND B(NULL, COMMITTED) <= 1/2 AND the seed-20261366 stability leg reproduces through twin evaluators
decision_rule.NULL: anything else — named axes: power-straddle (power in [1/2, 4/5)); coin-straddle (B(NULL, COMMITTED) in (1/2, 13/25)); sensitivity-conditional; arm disagreement surviving the INVALID diagnosis

fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C1_draw_order: the registered pinned order 'F draw then F daily coins' is EXTENDED per cycle with a T-block (1 T-draw then T coin-draws) so Arm S evaluates BEAT through the full protocol arithmetic (both accountings) rather than through the identity shortcut; the identity makes the T-block decision-irrelevant — asserted per MC cycle by requiring both accounting indicators to equal [R_F < 1]
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C2_crn: common random numbers across delta worlds at the same drift: flat coin i is UP iff u_i < p_up - delta; in-position coin j is UP iff v_j < p_up + delta (the 'correspondingly up-tilted' reading, reporting-only by the identity)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C3_mc_exactness: MC BEAT indicators are looked up from exact integer/Fraction lattice tables precomputed in Arm A from the protocol arithmetic of BOTH accountings (no float comparisons anywhere on a decision path)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C4_stability_parse: the stability leg (seed 20261366, N = 20000 cycles per decision world + 5000 seasons) must land the SAME class as the headline through both twin evaluators; a stability-leg agreement breach or class mismatch routes to INVALID per the 'any agreement breach' clause
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C5_reporting_mc: reporting legs (seed 20261367) run N = 20000 cycles per reporting cell, deviations REPORTED never gated; reporting seed is read by reporting legs only
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C6_aux_hygiene: aux seed 20261368 is never passed to random.Random — never-construct hygiene, asserted
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C7_size_row: the n = 8 NULL-world season size row (COMMITTED drift) is simulated and reported ungated (the registered gate covers the power row)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C8_ev_rows: EV rows use E[delta$] = 10000*(1-f)*E[R_T]*(1 - E[R_F]) exact per (drift, delta) decision world (dollar accounting; multiplicative-accounting EV differs only by the positive constant c^2 scale on wealth factors, reported alongside); exactly 0 at ZERO drift, negative at positive drift with delta = 0
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C9_sensitivity_ties: sensitivity s worlds recompute k*(F) by integer scan under their own up/down gross returns; any exact-tie lattice point counts as MISS per A5 and its count is reported (expected 0)

drafter_disclosed_landing_never_trusted.note: the sim re-derives everything from scratch and must not trust these; compared never gated
